name: PROPS
description: First proteorhodopsin-based voltage indicator, demonstrating that this class of microbial opsin can report electrical activity, though only functional in bacteria and extremely dim.

kinetics.note: Single exponential time constant of 4.7 ms for voltage step response; on/off not separately reported

dynamicRangeData.note: ΔF/F = 150% per 100 mV, measured via induced transmembrane voltage in E. coli

researchPapers.title: Initial photophysical characterization of the proteorhodopsin optical proton sensor (PROPS)
Voltage-gated calcium flux mediates Escherichia coli mechanosensation
researchPapers.authors: Bruni GN, Weekley RA, Dodd BJT, Kralj JM
researchPapers.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences

researchPapers.title: Membrane voltage dysregulation driven by metabolic dysfunction underlies bactericidal activity of aminoglycosides
